items.title: DR Congo cancels World Cup training camp over Ebola outbreak
items.dek: The outbreak, caused by a rare Ebola species, is thought to have caused 139 deaths so far.
items.body: The outbreak, caused by a rare Ebola species, is thought to have caused 139 deaths so far.

items.title: From AI to interceptors, Ukraine is trying to drone-proof its skies
items.dek: After four years of Russia's full-scale invasion, Ukraine has become far more successful at fighting off air raids.
